description: KB-628e — Final Integration: Testing, Documentation, and Polish. Complete the Missions system by performing comprehensive end-to-end testing, updating all documentation, adding the final integration touches, and ensuring the entire feature is production-ready. This task serves as the final quality gate before the Missions system can be considered fully implemented. See `.kb/tasks/KB-628e/PROMPT.md` for full specification.

log.outcome: This is a comprehensive and well-structured specification for the final integration task of the Missions system. The spec correctly identifies all cross-cutting concerns across 4 previous tasks (KB-632 through KB-635) and provides concrete, verifiable outcomes for each step. The testing strategy is thorough, requiring both automated tests (3 new test files) and manual workflow verification. Documentation requirements appropriately target user-facing surfaces (README.md, CLI help text, changeset)
